FAQs

Everything below also appears on the home page (signals & membership) and on Bots (automation)—collected here for easy reading.

Signals, VIP & payments

Trade calls are published setups: direction, entry zone, stop-loss, and take-profit levels you can mirror on your own exchange. “Signals” is how we deliver those calls—mainly in our VIP Telegram—so you get timely updates when plans change.

Calls are written for liquid crypto futures venues. Most members use major exchanges such as Binance, ByBit, KuCoin, OKX, or Bitget—use whichever you are verified on, as long as the same contract/symbol is available there.

Leverage lets you control a larger position than your margin deposit. It can amplify gains and losses; many of our setups reference moderate leverage (often in the 3x–8x range). Use only what you understand and can afford to lose—this is not personalised advice.

Pick a plan on the Pricing page, complete checkout, then follow the onboarding steps we send (usually via Telegram). If anything is unclear, message @AltGuruSupport.

Plans are activated after crypto payment and a quick confirmation with support. See Pay with crypto for the flow and what to include when you message @AltGuruSupport.

Head to the Results page for logs and performance reporting we publish on the site.

Start with small size (or demo), read how we format calls on Signals, and join the free Telegram to watch how updates flow. The About page explains our process in plain language—still, only trade with money you can lose.

Paid trial windows (if any) are always shown on Pricing at checkout. Everyone can follow the free public Telegram first to see our style before upgrading.

Message @AltGuruSupport with your current plan and what you want to switch to. We will confirm eligibility, any price difference, and timing so access stays uninterrupted where possible.

Contact @AltGuruSupport before your renewal date with the email or Telegram handle you used to subscribe. We will confirm when VIP access ends and remove you from billing where applicable—see Terms for refund windows that may apply.

Trading bots & Bundler

No. You can run bots with your own rules and risk settings. Many members pair them with signals for faster execution, but it is not required.

Yes. You adjust risk, sizing, filters, and behavior so automation follows logic you define — not a single preset you cannot change.

The crypto and forex bots focus on trade execution and automation. The Bundler is a separate tool for generating multiple wallets and streamlining token launch workflows — not for placing market trades.

After you subscribe, onboarding walks you through linking the accounts or APIs your setup supports. Exact steps depend on your venue — follow the secure setup in your member area or Telegram.

Use Pricing to choose a plan, then Join to complete access. You can also reach out on Telegram if you need help choosing crypto vs forex vs Bundler.

Disclaimer

Trading decisions are yours alone. AltGuru Signals is not liable for any loss or harm arising from how you use or ignore anything we publish on this site, in Telegram, or elsewhere. By using our materials, you agree you do so at your own risk.

Nothing we share is personalized financial or investment advice. Our trade ideas and calls are commentary and education, we document how we approach the market and share that process for learning. We will never ask to manage your funds, hold custody of your assets, or trade on your behalf.
